title: Correction: Geological Journal mass COI disclosure correction (98 articles, 2020-2025)
claim_summary: Research published in Geological Journal between 2020 and 2025 failed to disclose conflicts of interest between authors and editors; a mass correction was issued covering 98 articles. The journal found no evidence results in the papers were compromised.
stated_reason: The journal had not taken measures to manage potential conflicts of interest between authors and editors for 98 articles.
selection_method: Retraction Watch corrections category 2025. Selected because publisher explicitly states no results compromised - clean claim_stands_after_event=true example. Moderate fame (RW covered, no mainstream press).
publisher_fetch: blocked (Wiley 403 to automated fetch); verified via Crossref + Retraction Watch
verification_note: Crossref event_date 2025-05-08 vs entry 2025-05-01 (minor); entry retains kagi's date, discrepancy disclosed here.
corpus_scope: COI disclosure failures in geoscience publishing, 2020-2025
